projects.name: Hichord

projects.name: X-Ray Agent Workflow Visualizer
projects.description: A web-based tool that scans Claude Code projects and renders an interactive flowchart of agent delegation chains, tool assignments, rule enforcement, and prompt flow prediction.

projects.name: The Agency
projects.description: A real-time visual AI agent office where 42 AI agents work as pixel characters in an isometric office, responding to tasks via Telegram and collaborating through a structured hierarchy enforced by a Python backend.
projects.last_commit_message: feat: CosmosBeat Mobile — loop zone redesign + instrument overhaul

pending.name: Swedish AI - SMB Intelligence System
pending.description: Autonomous research pipeline that crawls Swedish-language sources daily to identify small and medium businesses publicly expressing operational problems that AI automation could solve, delivering structured intelligence briefs with company contacts.

pending.name: Scrap Runner
pending.description: Mad Max-style isometric scrap collecting game where you drive a junker car through a ruined city, loot wrecks, and drag parts onto your car to upgrade it. Features a Phaser 3 isometric world with a Three.js 3D car overlay.

pending.name: ComfyUI RunPod Setup
pending.description: Configuration, scripts, and tooling for running ComfyUI on a RunPod GPU pod (RTX 5090), including a LoRA/model catalog, prompt builder UIs, and workflow management.

pending.name: Podpal
pending.description: A Go web app that lets users patch custom boot logos into Rockbox firmware for iPod devices, supporting 10 iPod models with various pixel formats.
